rules.rule: Use Bootstrap utility classes for layout and spacing when Bootstrap is the selected foundation.

rules.category: No Business Rules in Class Selection
rules.rule: Do not encode business rules in CSS class selection. Use view model fields for domain-driven class decisions.
Component-specific styles must be co-located with the component or in a named style module.
Global stylesheets must contain only genuinely global concerns.
Do not use inline styles except for dynamic values that cannot be expressed with classes.
